title: Jo
html:
Yahir's late-2022 → mid-2023 partner. The first major relationship-evaluation arc explicitly documented in the corpus, and the structural prototype for the later Sam / Emily arcs. The Aug 2023 breakup is documented at length and surfaces in the breakup retro — one of the most direct relationship-as-evaluation artifacts in the vault. Functions in the canvas-worthy "relationship-evaluation pattern" thread.

TL;DR

  • 18 inbound citations spanning Aug 2022 → Feb 2024 — relationship + post-breakup processing window.
  • The relationship explicitly named ~Oct 2022 (2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream: "plan out dates with Jo"), ended Aug 2023 (2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup).
  • The breakup retro is structurally identical to later relationship retros (Sam, Emily) — same documenting-as-evaluation pattern.
  • "Must / cannot" relationship criteria written shortly before the breakup (2023 07 26 must cannot relationship criteria) — Yahir crystallizing standards mid-relationship.
  • Pre-breakup signals in the Vietnam reflection and early curiosity captures.
  • Crosses into other-women references (valeria, yesenia, gsmitty, zoe entity pages all reference Jo as the relationship-prototype anchor).

Key facts

  • Named October 2022. 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — "plan out dates with Jo," "wash lola" (Jo's dog?), draft text mid-sentence.
  • Earlier hints. 2022 08 28 ask what book she reads — pre-relationship curiosity captures.
  • Vietnam frame. 2022 09 04 never been in love vietnam — written right before the relationship became serious; reads as Yahir actively re-evaluating the should-I-let-this-happen question.
  • The "Jo" file. 2023 05 28 jo — a dedicated note from mid-relationship. Probably the most direct artifact.
  • Mid-relationship criteria-writing. 2023 07 26 must cannot relationship criteria — six weeks before breakup, Yahir wrote out his must-have / cannot-tolerate criteria. Definitive evaluation-mode signal.
  • Aug 2023 breakup. 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup — the retro. Same structural shape as later Sam breakup and Emily reflection.
  • 2024 still processing. 2024 01 19 THouhgts and things 11921, 2024 02 15 thoughts and things 2142024, 2024 02 24 Thoughts and Things 2242024, 2024 01 01 2023 year recap — six-month integration window.
  • Pre-determined stances. 2023 02 01 pre determined stances — mid-relationship articulation of standing positions.

Chronological arc

  • Aug 2022 — pre-relationship curiosity (2022 08 28 ask what book she reads).
  • Sept–Oct 2022 — relationship begins, Vietnam-trip processing (2022 09 04 never been in love vietnam, 2022 10 15 5 21 2022 thoughts, 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream).
  • Feb 2023 — pre-determined stances articulation (2023 02 01 pre determined stances).
  • May 2023 — dedicated Jo note (2023 05 28 jo).
  • Jul 2023 — criteria-writing (2023 07 26 must cannot relationship criteria).
  • Aug 2023 — breakup (2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup).
  • Jan–Feb 2024 — integration / retros (2024 01 01 2023 year recap, 2024 01 19 THouhgts and things 11921, 2024 02 15 thoughts and things 2142024, 2024 02 24 Thoughts and Things 2242024).

Source summaries

  • 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup — breakup retro
  • 2023 07 26 must cannot relationship criteria — pre-breakup criteria
  • 2023 05 28 jo — dedicated mid-relationship note
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — relationship-naming moment
  • 2022 09 04 never been in love vietnam — pre-relationship hesitation
  • 2024 01 01 2023 year recap — integration retro
  • 2023 02 01 pre determined stances
  • 2022 08 28 ask what book she reads — earliest curiosity
  • 2024 02 15 thoughts and things 2142024
  • 2024 02 24 Thoughts and Things 2242024

Plus ~3 additional integration summaries.

Connections

  • sam · emily — later relationship-evaluation arcs (same structural pattern)
  • valeria · yesenia · gsmitty · zoe — other relationship entities cross-referencing Jo as anchor
  • post breakup conflict · piercing prompts · cons list relationship critique — concepts that surface across all three relationship arcs
  • recurring theme you havent named (query) — surfaces this entity
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 (synthesis) — relationship arc inside the founder-loneliness through-line
